Tests the `toString` method of a string in JavaScript.

# Purpose
This code is a simple assertion test that verifies the behavior of the `toString` method on a string object in JavaScript. It checks if calling `toString` on the string `"abc"` returns the same string `"abc"`. This test ensures that the `toString` method functions correctly for string objects, confirming that it does not alter the original string value. The code provides narrow functionality, focusing on a specific aspect of string manipulation in JavaScript.
